◎简　　介  

　　In 1971, Motor Racing fan and filmmaker Roman Polanski spent a weekend with world champion driver Jackie Stewart as he attempted to win the Monaco Grand Prix,offering an extraordinarily rare glimpse into the life of a gifted athlete at the height of his powers.Polanski was given intimate access to Stewart's world.
